calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re Twitter, Inc.S Petition To Quash Or Modify Subpoena For Production Of Business Records In Action Pending Outside California
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. WINNIE HUNG, ESQ. of Perkins Coie LLP (Tel: 650-838-4703) appearing for petitioner Twitter, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER TWITTER INC.'S Petition To Quash Or Modify Subpoena For Production Of Business Records In Action Pending Outside California.

Petitioner stipulates to the pro tem judge. Matter submitted without argument. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner's motion to quash is unopposed and granted. Identity of an anonymous online speaker can be unmasked pursuant to balancing of First Amendment rights and litigation needs. A party seeking relief must initially make an evidentiary showing of a cause of action for defamation or libel and then demonstrate a compelling need which outweighs the poster's privacy right. The process allows the court to rule on balancing of the competing interests. In failing to oppose the motion the respondent has not met either requirement. A copy of this order with Notice of Entry shall be served on the attorney for the respondent within ten days of the date of its posting in the Register of Actions. Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
